findings.finding: The fading of support across practice tasks is well-structured, successfully guiding the learner from targeted questions to independent construction, and explicitly linking prerequisite repair to the planning activity.
findings.resolution: No change required. The progression is validated.

findings.finding: The rubric successfully distinguishes completion-focused planning from evidence-based capacity management. It effectively tests the objectives while maintaining strict alignment to the lesson's bounds.

limitations: Did not test rendering or accessibility compatibility. Did not evaluate the lesson using live student trial data.
